languages.text: "Я не имел и по прежнему не имею намерения причинять вам вред, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Бог-Император видит, быть может, из вас еще выйдет достойный вассал". {n}Себериан небрежно машет рукой.{/n} "Но полно. У нас есть другие дела".

"I had no intention of causing you harm, my heir, and still do not. The God-Emperor knows you might make a worthy vassal yet." {n}Seberian waves a hand casually.{/n} "But enough on that. We have other business."
languages.original_text: "Я не имел и по прежнему не имею намерения причинять вам вред, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Бог-Император видит, быть может, из вас еще выйдет достойный вассал". {n}Себериан небрежно машет рукой.{/n} "Но полно. У нас есть другие дела".

traits.locale_text: "I never intended and do not intend now to cause you harm, my heir. The God-Emperor knows you might make a worthy vassal yet." {n}Seberian waves a hand casually.{/n} "But enough on that. We have other business."

"I never intended and do not intend now to cause you harm, my heir. The God-Emperor knows you might make a worthy vassal yet." {n}Seberian waves a hand casually.{/n} "But enough on that. We have other business."

"I had no intention of causing you harm, my heir, and still do not. The God-Emperor knows you might make a worthy vassal yet." {n}Seberian waves a hand casually.{/n} "But enough on that. We have other business."

"I had no intention of causing you harm, my heir, and still do not. The God-Emperor knows you might make a worthy vassal yet." {n}Seberian waves a hand casually.{/n} "But enough on that. We have other business."

"I had no intention of causing you harm, my heir, and still do not. The God-Emperor knows you might make a worthy vassal yet." {n}Seberian waves a hand casually.{/n} "But enough on that. We have other business."

languages.text: "Ich hatte nie vor, Euch zu schaden, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}, und daran hat sich nichts geändert. In den Augen des Gottimperators seid Ihr immer noch {mf|ein würdiger Vasall|eine würdige Vasallin}." {n}Seberian winkt ab.{/n} "Aber genug davon. Wir haben andere Probleme."
languages.original_text: "I had no intention of causing you harm, my heir, and still do not. The God-Emperor knows you might make a worthy vassal yet." {n}Seberian waves a hand casually.{/n} "But enough on that. We have other business."

traits.locale_text: "Ich hatte nie vor, Euch zu schaden, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}, und daran hat sich nichts geändert. In den Augen des Gottimperators seid Ihr immer noch {mf|ein würdiger Vasall|eine würdige Vasallin}." {n}Seberian winkt ab.{/n} "Aber genug davon. Wir haben andere Probleme."

languages.text: « Je n'avais nullement l'intention de vous causer du tort, mon {mf|héritier|héritière}, et ce n'est toujours pas le cas. L'Empereur-Dieu espère toujours faire de vous {mf|un puissant vassal|une puissante vassale}. » {n}Seberian esquisse un geste désinvolte.{/n} « Mais changeons de sujet. Nous en avons d'autres bien plus pressants à évoquer. »
languages.original_text: "I had no intention of causing you harm, my heir, and still do not. The God-Emperor knows you might make a worthy vassal yet." {n}Seberian waves a hand casually.{/n} "But enough on that. We have other business."

traits.locale_text: « Je n'avais nullement l'intention de vous causer du tort, mon {mf|héritier|héritière}, et ce n'est toujours pas le cas. L'Empereur-Dieu espère toujours faire de vous {mf|un puissant vassal|une puissante vassale}. » {n}Seberian esquisse un geste désinvolte.{/n} « Mais changeons de sujet. Nous en avons d'autres bien plus pressants à évoquer. »

languages.text: «No tenía ninguna intención de perjudicarte, hereder{mf|o|a}, ni la tengo ahora. El Dios Emperador sabe que aún puedes ser un{mf||a} vasall{mf|o|a} dign{mf|o|a}». {n}Seberian agita la mano en un gesto casual.{/n} «Pero dejemos eso a un lado. Tenemos otros asuntos que atender».
languages.original_text: "I had no intention of causing you harm, my heir, and still do not. The God-Emperor knows you might make a worthy vassal yet." {n}Seberian waves a hand casually.{/n} "But enough on that. We have other business."

traits.locale_text: «No tenía ninguna intención de perjudicarte, hereder{mf|o|a}, ni la tengo ahora. El Dios Emperador sabe que aún puedes ser un{mf||a} vasall{mf|o|a} dign{mf|o|a}». {n}Seberian agita la mano en un gesto casual.{/n} «Pero dejemos eso a un lado. Tenemos otros asuntos que atender».

languages.text: "Sana zarar vermek gibi bir niyetim yoktu vârisim. Hâlâ da yok. Tanrı İmparator biliyor, belki de layık bir vasal olabilirsin." {n}Seberian, elini umursamazca sallıyor.{/n} "Fakat bu kadar yeter. Başka işlerimiz var."
languages.original_text: "I had no intention of causing you harm, my heir, and still do not. The God-Emperor knows you might make a worthy vassal yet." {n}Seberian waves a hand casually.{/n} "But enough on that. We have other business."

traits.locale_text: "Sana zarar vermek gibi bir niyetim yoktu vârisim. Hâlâ da yok. Tanrı İmparator biliyor, belki de layık bir vasal olabilirsin." {n}Seberian, elini umursamazca sallıyor.{/n} "Fakat bu kadar yeter. Başka işlerimiz var."

languages.text: “我从没想过要害你，我的继承人，现在也一样。神皇在上，说不定你还能当个称职的封臣。”{n}塞贝里安漫不经心地挥了挥手。{/n}“不过这事先放一边。我们还有别的事要处理。”
languages.original_text: "I had no intention of causing you harm, my heir, and still do not. The God-Emperor knows you might make a worthy vassal yet." {n}Seberian waves a hand casually.{/n} "But enough on that. We have other business."

traits.locale_text: “我从没想过要害你，我的继承人，现在也一样。神皇在上，说不定你还能当个称职的封臣。”{n}塞贝里安漫不经心地挥了挥手。{/n}“不过这事先放一边。我们还有别的事要处理。”

languages.text: 「君に危害を加えるつもりは、君が私の後継者である以上、今もない。神皇帝も君が立派な臣下になるかもしれないと知っている。」{n}シベリアは手を軽く振る。{/n}「しかし、それはそれで十分だ。他に用事がある。」
languages.original_text: "I had no intention of causing you harm, my heir, and still do not. The God-Emperor knows you might make a worthy vassal yet." {n}Seberian waves a hand casually.{/n} "But enough on that. We have other business."

traits.locale_text: 「君に危害を加えるつもりは、君が私の後継者である以上、今もない。神皇帝も君が立派な臣下になるかもしれないと知っている。」{n}シベリアは手を軽く振る。{/n}「しかし、それはそれで十分だ。他に用事がある。」
